case_title: ARTEK CONSULTING ENGINEERS VS MEI, KAY SUEY

docket_entries.description: CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 22857, RECORD TRANSFERRED
CERT. RECEIPT TO KAY SUEY MEI RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARTEK CONSULTING ENGINEERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEI, KAY SUEY $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $620.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARTEK CONSULTING ENGINEERS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MEI, KAY SUEY JUDGM. ORDERED FOR DEFEND. & AGAINST PLTFF. FOR ZERO AMOUNT. 12-14-93 IN SCA 22857 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY ARTEK CONSULTING ENGINEERS AS TO DEFENDANT MEI, KAY SUEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
